decisions.rationale: onModulesCompletedCountChanged and incrementModulesCompletedCount are thin orchestration layers (early-return when previous === current, computeAiConfidenceLevel, patchOnboardingAndResults). computeAiConfidenceLevel is exhaustively unit-tested (8 cases, all pass including count 7). Functional audit FV-2 and AC-2 pass; PATHS-07 wires incrementModulesCompletedCount after session completion (FV-3). Mocked Supabase integration tests for patch payload are valid backlog but not in API-06 acceptance criteria. API-06 is the final MOD-DRSAM-API item with no downstream depends_on consumers — same defer pattern as API-05 C-2 for calculateUserAiCoachingMode orchestration tests.

Bubble ai_confidence_level_os option set bTIFQ caps at modules_completed_count 6; no seventh range exists in IR. The ?? AI_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.DIRECT fallback for counts above range max is correct range_contains_point parity and is already asserted in resolveAiConfidenceLevel.test.ts (count 7 → direct). AI_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL_RANGES documents bTIFK–bTIFQ bounds in coachingMode.ts. An inline comment in resolveAiConfidenceLevel.ts clarifying above-max inheritance is polish only — not an AC violation, not a ui_ref gap, and does not block module closeout.

summary: Review passed (ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, 0 blockers). 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Both critiques are low-priority gaps that do not violate ACs or block downstream items. API-06 is the final MOD-DRSAM-API item — advance to module closeout. Deferred backlog: userProfileHooks integration tests for patch payload/early-return, and inline comment for counts-above-bTIFQ-max direct fallback.
